---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new skill, pattern, or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Type

- [ ] New skill (new topic area)
- [ ] New pattern/example in existing skill
- [ ] New reference file
- [ ] Improvement to existing content
- [ ] Other

## Description

What would you like to see added or improved?

## Use Case

When would this be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Example

If applicable, provide a code example or outline of what the content should look like.
